name: Luffy Is the Man Who Will Be King of the Pirates!!!

issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' (Sanji in play), but card text says 'If your Leader is [Sanji]' — should use 'LeaderIsName' condition type
SearchDeck action does not capture the 'look at 3 cards from top' mechanic — must specify lookCount:3 and allow selective placement of remainder at bottom of deck
Filter 'kind:Any' is too broad — should specify 'maxCount:1' to enforce 'up to 1 card' to hand constraint
